examples: Others, like the horned triceratops, were clearly adapted to shearing plant for food.
Frass of long-horned beetle larvae plays an important role in natural enemies searching for their cerambycid hosts.
Some animals have been de-horned to deter poaching.
If you are accosted by a boatload of horned-helmeted Vikings when strolling Dublin's streets, do not be alarmed.
Shoe-horned into their entertainment, they passively accept mini-lectures about detergents, frozen foods, hair coloring and beer.
